tools.name: LangSmith
tools.description: Full-stack LLM observability, debugging, testing, and monitoring platform by LangChain. Gold standard for tracing complex agent paths, loop detection, and tool-call visualization.
tools.pricing: Free tier (5k traces/mo), Plus $39/seat/mo, Enterprise custom
tools.target_audience: AI/ML engineers building with LangChain or general LLM apps

tools.name: DeepEval
tools.description: Open-source LLM evaluation framework with research-backed metrics including G-Eval, hallucination detection, answer relevancy, and task completion scoring using LLM-as-a-judge.
tools.pricing: Open-source (free). Confident AI cloud platform has paid tiers.
tools.target_audience: AI engineers, ML teams wanting test-driven LLM development

tools.name: Promptfoo
tools.description: Local-first CLI and dashboard for evaluating prompts, RAG flows, and agents. Focused on automated testing and red-teaming/security testing in CI/CD pipelines.
tools.pricing: Open-source (free). Cloud version has paid tiers.
tools.target_audience: Developers, DevOps teams, security-conscious engineering teams

tools.name: Langfuse
tools.description: Open-source LLM engineering platform for tracing, prompt management, and evaluation. Supports LLM-as-judge metrics, human annotations, benchmarks, and production monitoring.
tools.pricing: Free self-hosted. Cloud: Free tier, Pro $59/mo, Team $399/mo, Enterprise custom
tools.target_audience: Engineering teams building LLM-powered products

tools.name: Braintrust
tools.description: AI observability platform for building quality AI products. Offers online/offline scorers, AI proxy with unified API across providers, and comprehensive tracing.
tools.pricing: Free tier (1M trace spans, 10k scores), Pro and Enterprise tiers
tools.target_audience: AI product teams, full-stack developers

tools.name: Arize Phoenix
tools.description: Open-source LLM tracing and evaluation tool built on OpenTelemetry. Strong in RAG evaluation with dataset clustering, embedding visualization, and automated instrumentation.
tools.pricing: Open-source (free). Arize cloud platform has paid tiers with annual contracts.
tools.target_audience: ML engineers, data scientists, RAG developers

tools.name: Ragas
tools.description: Specialized open-source framework for evaluating RAG pipelines. Provides metrics like faithfulness, answer relevancy, context precision, and context recall.
tools.target_audience: Teams building RAG applications

tools.name: TruLens
tools.description: Open-source tool for evaluating and tracing AI agents and RAG applications using feedback functions for groundedness, context relevance, and coherence.
tools.target_audience: AI researchers and engineers building RAG/agent systems

tools.name: Giskard
tools.description: AI red-teaming and LLM security platform providing hallucination detection, factuality checks, robustness testing, and automatic test suite generation from detected issues.
tools.target_audience: Enterprise AI teams, compliance and security teams

tools.name: Opik (by Comet)
tools.description: Open-source end-to-end LLM development platform with observability, evaluation, and monitoring. Supports Pytest-based model unit tests and integrates with major frameworks.
tools.pricing: Open-source (free). Comet cloud has paid tiers.
tools.target_audience: ML engineers, AI development teams

tools.name: Evidently AI
tools.description: AI evaluation and LLM observability platform with 100+ built-in metrics, visual reports, test suites, and live monitoring dashboards for LLMs, RAGs, and multi-agent workflows.
tools.pricing: Open-source core (free). Cloud platform has paid tiers.
tools.target_audience: Data science and ML teams, production AI teams

tools.name: Patronus AI
tools.description: Enterprise AI evaluation and testing platform focused on simulation research, hallucination detection, and comprehensive LLM output assessment. Integrates with CrewAI.
tools.target_audience: Enterprise AI teams, regulated industries

tools.name: Helicone
tools.description: LLM observability platform with built-in caching and cost tracking. One-line integration via base URL swap for minimal-effort observability.
tools.target_audience: Developers wanting quick LLM observability with minimal setup

tools.name: AgentOps
tools.description: Python SDK for AI agent monitoring, LLM cost tracking, and benchmarking. Features time-travel debugging, multi-agent workflow visualization, and session replay.
tools.target_audience: Python developers building AI agents

tools.name: LangWatch
tools.description: LLM monitoring platform with built-in evaluations, token-level usage tracking, guardrails, and topic clustering for production applications.
tools.target_audience: Teams running LLM apps in production

tools.name: Lunary
tools.description: Lightweight open-source LLM monitoring platform focused on RAG pipelines and chatbots with specialized tracing for retrieval-augmented generation.
tools.target_audience: Small teams building RAG chatbots

tools.name: Humanloop
tools.description: LLM IDE for building, testing, and monitoring AI applications. Supports prompt/agent management with built-in version control, collaboration, and evaluation tools.
tools.pricing: Free tier, Pro and Enterprise tiers
tools.target_audience: Product teams and engineers collaborating on LLM apps

tools.name: Maxim AI
tools.description: End-to-end AI evaluation platform combining simulation, evaluation, and observability. Standout agent simulation feature tests across thousands of scenarios with different user personas.
tools.pricing: Free tier, Pro $29/seat/mo, Business $49/seat/mo, Enterprise custom
tools.target_audience: Teams deploying agent-based workflows in production

tools.name: Portkey
tools.description: AI gateway with integrated observability, guardrails, and governance. Routes to 200+ LLMs with load balancing, failover, and centralized monitoring.
tools.target_audience: Engineering teams managing multiple LLM providers

tools.name: Galileo AI
tools.description: LLM evaluation platform with Luna-2 models providing real-time guardrails to block problematic responses. Strong in evaluation metrics and production guardrails.
tools.target_audience: Enterprise teams needing real-time LLM guardrails

tools.name: Virtue AI (Agent ForgingGround)
tools.description: Enterprise-scale testing ground for continuous evaluation and stress-testing of AI agents and multi-agent systems, featuring built-in red-teaming agents.
tools.target_audience: Enterprise teams deploying AI agents at scale

tools.name: Inspect AI
tools.description: Open-source LLM evaluation framework by the UK AI Safety Institute supporting research-grade model-level and agent-level evaluation.
tools.target_audience: AI safety researchers, academic institutions

tools.name: Datadog LLM Observability
tools.description: End-to-end tracing across AI agents within the Datadog ecosystem. Provides visibility into inputs, outputs, latency, token usage, and errors at each step.
tools.target_audience: Enterprise teams already using Datadog

tools.name: Weights & Biases (W&B)
tools.description: Mature ML experiment tracking platform expanded to support LLM evaluation and monitoring. Ideal for teams already in the W&B ecosystem.
tools.pricing: Free for individuals, Teams $50/user/mo, Enterprise custom
tools.target_audience: ML teams, research labs

tools.name: Parea AI
tools.description: Platform for debugging, testing, and monitoring LLM applications with detailed tracing, prompt experiment comparison, and pre-built/custom evaluation metrics.
tools.target_audience: Engineering teams building production LLM products

tools.name: Orq.ai
tools.description: Generative AI collaboration platform supporting multiple evaluation strategies including function-based, Python, LLM-as-a-Judge, and RAGAS for generation, retrieval, and reasoning.
tools.target_audience: Cross-functional teams (engineers, PMs, domain experts)

tools.name: Agenta
tools.description: Open-source LLM developer platform with prompt management, evaluation, and observability. Self-hostable with focus on collaborative prompt engineering.
tools.target_audience: Engineering teams wanting self-hosted LLM tooling

tools.name: Mabl
tools.description: AI-powered test automation platform for software testing that has expanded into AI application testing with autonomous test generation and self-healing tests.
tools.target_audience: QA teams, enterprise software testing

tools.name: Applitools
tools.description: Visual AI testing platform using computer vision for visual validation of AI-generated UIs and outputs.
tools.target_audience: QA teams focused on visual validation

tools.name: Testomat.io
tools.description: Test management platform with specific capabilities for AI agent testing, including test case management and reporting for AI QA workflows.
tools.target_audience: QA teams testing AI agents
